# Pressure Test

**Summary**: A physical test where fluid is pumped into the casing to check for pressure drops indicating leaks.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] applied pressure tests to evaluate the mechanical integrity of the well casing.

## Key Results and Findings

- Pressure tests were used to confirm that certain sections were corroded but not leaking. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 70]])
